mapper.select: SELECT id, table_code, group_code, group_title, group_type, sort_order, default_open, status, remarks, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM sys_form_group_meta WHERE table_code = #{tableCode} ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT id, table_code, group_code, group_title, group_type, sort_order, default_open, status, remarks, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM sys_form_group_meta WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_form_group_meta SET table_code = #{tableCode}, group_code = #{groupCode}, group_title = #{groupTitle}, group_type = #{groupType}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, default_open = #{defaultOpen}, status = #{status}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
